Ntc Of Mtn For Monetary Issue, Evidence And/Or Terminating Sanctions Against Pls
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Laura S. Flynn, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Vena Shotiveyarata

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Vena Shotiveyarata's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The claims of plaintiffs Sullivan, Mallard, Walker and Wentworth are ordered dismissed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $960 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR#7156. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Vena Shotiveyarata's motion to compel verified responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $380 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Set For Trial On Aug-13-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-25-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
